essential_assertions.text: assert(t1 * dxy <= 999_999_000_000i64) by(nonlinear_arith) requires 1 <= t1 <= 1_000_000, 0 <= dxy <= 999_999, ;
assert(t2 * dxy <= 999_999_000_000i64) by(nonlinear_arith) requires 1 <= t2 <= 1_000_000, 0 <= dxy <= 999_999, ;
assert(t2 * dxz <= 999_999_000_000i64) by(nonlinear_arith) requires 1 <= t2 <= 1_000_000, 0 <= dxz <= 999_999, ;
